testcase.name: Manage offered skills 01 Add new skills successfully and check they are stored
testcase.classname: 01 Add new skills successfully and check they are stored

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Advanced Java Programming' within the element: <div.skills-grid> but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Advanced Java Programming' within the element: <div.skills-grid> but never did. at Context.eval (webpack://spring2_test/./cypress/e2e/sprint2/manage_offered_skills.cy.js:37:69)

testcase.name: Manage offered skills 02 Edit existing skills and save correctly
testcase.classname: 02 Edit existing skills and save correctly

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Advanced Java Programming' within the selector: '.skill-card' but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Advanced Java Programming' within the selector: '.skill-card' but never did. at Context.eval (webpack://spring2_test/./cypress/e2e/sprint2/manage_offered_skills.cy.js:43:11)

testcase.name: Manage offered skills 03 Delete skills and verify removal

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Master Java Programming' within the selector: '.skill-card' but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Master Java Programming' within the selector: '.skill-card' but never did. at Context.eval (webpack://spring2_test/./cypress/e2e/sprint2/manage_offered_skills.cy.js:61:11)

testcase.name: Manage offered skills 04 Verify users can only modify their own skills
testcase.classname: 04 Verify users can only modify their own skills
